name: Bucks County Employees
description_short: Peake Federal Credit Union (formerly Baltimore County Credit Union) is a Maryland-based credit union offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards to members.
description_long:
Peake Federal Credit Union, formerly known as Baltimore County Credit Union, is a federally chartered credit union serving the Maryland area. The institution has a long history of member relationships, with testimonials from members dating back to 1990, indicating stability and consistent service delivery over decades.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including deposit accounts (checking, savings, certificates of deposit, IRAs), lending products (auto loans, mortgages, home equity loans, personal loans, student loans), and payment services (Visa Platinum credit cards, debit cards, bill pay, Zelle transfers). They provide digital banking options including mobile banking, phone banking, and online account management. Current advertised rates include auto loans as low as 4.75% APR, personal loans as low as 8.90% APR, and home equity fixed-rate loans as low as 5.75% APR.

Peake Federal distinguishes itself through member-focused service, with staff members specifically mentioned by name in testimonials, suggesting a community-oriented approach. They actively engage members through events like "Shred Day" and offer educational content through their blog ("Peake Perspective"). The rebranding from Baltimore County Credit Union to Peake Federal Credit Union reflects organizational evolution while maintaining member relationships.

As a credit union, membership eligibility may be limited to specific communities or employment groups. The website provides limited detail on membership requirements or eligibility criteria. Rates advertised are promotional and actual rates depend on creditworthiness and loan terms. Like all financial institutions, they are subject to regulatory requirements and standard banking risks.
services: Checking accounts with debit card access
Savings accounts and certificates of deposit (CDs)
Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs) and retirement planning products
Home equity loans and lines of credit
Bill pay and Zelle money transfer services
Mobile banking and digital banking platforms
pros: Auto loan rates as low as 4.75% APR, competitive in the market
Multiple loan product options including mortgages, home equity, personal, and student loans
Digital banking services including mobile banking, bill pay, and Zelle transfers
Member testimonials spanning 30+ years indicate long-term stability and relationship continuity
Active member engagement through community events like Shred Day
Visa Platinum credit card with rewards available to members
Multiple service channels: in-person, phone banking, digital, and mobile platforms
cons: Website does not clearly specify membership eligibility criteria or who can join
Limited transparency on fees for various products and services
Promotional rates advertised may not reflect rates available to all applicants based on creditworthiness
best_for: Maryland residents seeking a community-oriented credit union with long-term member relationships
Borrowers with good credit looking for competitive auto and home equity loan rates
Members seeking comprehensive financial services from a single institution (banking, lending, credit cards)
diagnosis: Peake Federal Credit Union is best for Maryland residents who qualify for membership and seek a full-service credit union with competitive lending rates and personalized member service. The main caveat is that membership eligibility is not clearly defined on their website, so prospective members should contact the credit union directly to confirm they meet eligibility requirements.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Bucks County Employees — NCUA-insured credit union in Doylestown, PA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
